node: Pyramids of Giza are logic processors
historical_parallel: The Burning of the Library of Alexandria (391 AD)
era_resolution: Loss of knowledge and reliance on oral tradition

protocol: UESP Apex Engine recommends integrating advanced technological solutions to enhance the preservation and understanding of historical knowledge, while acknowledging the importance of divine wisdom in guiding human innovation
